description_long: This is a modern, boxy residential house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly white and gray exterior. The front facade includes a large garage door, a blue entry door, and several windows, with a paved driveway leading up to the entrance. The rooftop contains a mix of open terraces, a small garden, and a pool, providing outdoor living spaces. The rear and side views show limited window openings and a focus on privacy, with some outdoor structures and figures suggesting a backyard or patio area. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with some wooden accents on the roof and terrace areas. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with functional outdoor spaces and a strong emphasis on geometric forms.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a white and gray exterior, large garage, rooftop terraces, and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, blue entry door, windows, and paved driveway, with rooftop terraces and pool visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, minimal window openings, and rooftop terrace with glass railing.
description_view_2: Rear view with limited windows, rooftop garden, and visible backyard structures and figures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, rooftop terrace, and backyard elements including outdoor structures and figures.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entry with blue door, no porch, integrated into the facade with a paved driveway and minimal decorative elements.
